yogaAstral.completedNote: Practice recorded. You can unmark it if you repeat it another day.

lunar.intro: Each month has two important moons: the New Moon, which opens a cycle, and the Full Moon, which closes it. Depending on where each one falls in your chart, it activates a different area of life. Here you can see what this month brings and what to do with it.
lunar.subtitle: Two moons mark this month. Tap them to enter.
lunar.calculating: Calculating your moon of the month...
lunar.calculateError: Could not calculate the moon of the month.
lunar.emptyMonth: We could not find lunations for this month.
lunar.emptyReading: This moon has something to tell you.

result.intro: This is how the planets were aligned when you were born.
result.title: This is the sky map from your birth
result.subtitle: A first visual reading to explore your chart with calm.
result.prompt: Tap a planet to explore it

primaryTabs.upcomingMessage: This view is already prepared inside the experience, but its content is not active yet.

planGate.title: Unlock {featureName}
planGate.description: This layer opens deeper readings of your chart and relationships. It is included in the paid plans.

chartHeader.selectPlanet: tap a planet to read its story
chartHeader.intro: This is your natal chart: a snapshot of the sky at the exact moment you were born. Each planet marks something of yours: how you think, what moves you, where you have strength, where there is friction. Tap any planet to read what it says about you.

solarReturnPage.title: The map of your year.
solarReturnPage.intro: The Solar Return is a new chart calculated for the moment the Sun returns to the exact point it occupied when you were born: your birthday. That chart describes the climate of the year ahead: which area of life asks for more attention, which emotions become central, and what kind of movement the cycle brings. It is not destiny: it is the map of the year.
solarReturnPage.cityQuestion: In which city will you spend your birthday?
solarReturnPage.cityHint: The city matters: it changes the Ascendant of the year.
solarReturnPage.readingTitle: What this cycle is here to open.
solarReturnPage.yogaTitle: Yoga for each season of the year
solarReturnPage.errorMessage: Could not calculate the Solar Return.

synastryPage.title: Two charts, one field.
synastryPage.intro: Synastry compares two natal charts to see how they fit together. It is not a compatibility score: it is a map of how the bond works between two people, where it flows easily, where there is tension, and what the relationship is here to teach. Enter the other person's birth details to see the analysis.

layerEmpty.fisico: There is no dominant physical signature through close aspects. Attraction may exist, but it is not the technical centre of this comparison.
layerEmpty.sexual: There is no strong sexual activation in the main aspects. That does not deny desire: it only shows this is not the most insistent astrological layer.
layerEmpty.emocional: The emotional layer is not especially marked by close aspects. It is better read through real communication and everyday care.
layerEmpty.mental: The mental connection does not dominate the compared chart. There may be conversation, but the bond is activated more through other routes.
layerEmpty.profesional: There is no especially strong professional dynamic in the main aspects. If you work together, structure and expectations need care outside the chart.
layerEmpty.evolutivo: There is no dominant evolutionary signature through close aspects. The bond may teach, but it does not seem to push from a major pressure point.

transitPage.eyebrow: what's happening in your sky right now
transitPage.title: Your chart right now.
transitPage.description: In the centre is your natal chart, as always. Outside are today's planets. When a planet today falls on one of yours, something gets activated in your life. This view tells you exactly which area of your life is responding right now.
transitPage.calculatingBody: I'm building the transit chart to overlay on your natal chart.
transitPage.errorBody: I need the original birth data and location to build this wheel correctly.
transitPage.activatedAreaBody: This is activated through {points}. Read this house as a stage: the transit is not only moving events, it is also asking for a new way of showing up in your life.
transitPage.silentSkyBody: There are no exact major transits on the main natal planets right now. This suggests the emphasis is less concentrated and may feel more like integration than a visible shift.

astrocartographyPage.title: Your lines across the world.
astrocartographyPage.description: Choose a city and see which chart lines pass nearby. The reading combines distance, planet and angle into practical choices.
astrocartographyPage.panelEmptyBody: Once you select a place, the map will focus there and this panel will show the nearest lines.
astrocartographyPage.panelSelectedBody: These are the closest lines to the selected place. Tap any line to highlight it on the map.
astrocartographyPage.readingPlaceholder: Select a city to generate a clear reading of benefits, friction and how to use that place well.
astrocartographyPage.readingError: Could not generate the astrocartography reading.
astrocartographyPage.lineInfoPlaceholder: Tap a map line or a nearby line to see which planet and angle it activates.

planetMeanings.sun: Highlights places where your identity, confidence and life direction become more visible.
planetMeanings.moon: Activates belonging, memory, the emotional body and the need to feel at home.
planetMeanings.mercury: Moves study, writing, conversation, contacts and practical decisions.
planetMeanings.venus: Opens relationships, pleasure, aesthetics, sociability and softer ways of receiving.
planetMeanings.mars: Raises drive, desire, competition, initiative and also friction if you move too fast.
planetMeanings.jupiter: Expands opportunity, travel, teaching, confidence and a sense of growth.
planetMeanings.saturn: Asks for structure, responsibility, maturity, limits and sustained work.
planetMeanings.uranus: Awakens change, independence, experimentation and unexpected turns.
planetMeanings.neptune: Sensitizes intuition, spirituality, art and also the tendency to idealize.
planetMeanings.pluto: Intensifies transformation, personal power, psychological depth and closure processes.

angleMeanings.AC: You live it personally: body, identity, presence and how you enter life.
angleMeanings.DC: It activates through bonds: partners, clients, agreements, mirrors and negotiation.
angleMeanings.MC: It touches public life: vocation, career, reputation, goals and visible direction.
angleMeanings.IC: It is felt inwardly: home, roots, family, intimacy and emotional ground.

solarReturn.title: Solar Return
solarReturn.subtitle: Yearly reading
solarReturn.body: The map of your year will open here: the Sun's return, the birthday city, and the themes asking for attention.

synastry.title: Synastry
synastry.subtitle: Relationship reading
synastry.body: Here you will compare two charts as mirrors of consciousness, without reducing the bond to a score.

generalReading.title: Your chart, in essence
generalReading.placeholder: You can generate this reading whenever you want. It will be saved for this chart so you don't have to request it again.

essence.title: Your essence
essence.oneLiner: An initial synthesis of your Sun begins from
paragraphs: This is the base identity reading that frames the overall experience.
Your Sun marks the main thread: how you choose, where you assert yourself, and what you need to remember when you doubt yourself.

feelings.title: How you feel
feelings.fullText: Your Moon speaks about your emotional reactions, what you need to feel safe, and how you ask for care even when you do not say it directly.

love.title: What you value
love.oneLiner: Your values, desire, and taste begin to take shape through
paragraphs: This block summarizes the emotional tone, attraction pattern, and primary relationship climate.
Venus shows what attracts you, what you value, and what you should not negotiate just to keep the peace.

mind.title: How you think
mind.oneLiner: Your mind and voice organize themselves between
paragraphs: This section focuses on language, ideas, and mental style.
The structure is ready to receive richer copy in the next phase.

purpose.title: Your purpose
purpose.oneLiner: Your deeper direction can be sensed between
paragraphs: This block points toward vocation, visibility, and developmental direction.
For now it remains an editorial base that we can later refine with real interpretation.

challenges.title: Your challenges
challenges.oneLiner: Your most formative tensions appear between
paragraphs: This section gathers demanding lessons, friction points, and inner maturation.
Later we can replace it with a more specific reading based on aspects and rulerships.

ascendant.title: Your ascendant
ascendant.oneLiner: Your way of entering life begins through
paragraphs: This reads the living mask, first impression, and way you move toward the world.
This block later connects your Ascendant with your Sun and Moon for a finer reading.

action.title: How you act
action.oneLiner: Your drive and action style ignite through

growth.title: Where you grow
growth.oneLiner: Your expansion finds its path through

breakthrough.title: Where you break patterns
breakthrough.oneLiner: Your freedom asks for space through

dreams.title: Where you dream
dreams.oneLiner: Your imagination and sensitivity open through

transformation.title: Where you transform
transformation.oneLiner: Your power to be reborn activates through

messages.meanNodeNote: Calculated using the Mean Node — psychological use.

editorial.summarySuffix: and takes shape in the sphere of
editorial.retrogradeActive: Retrograde motion softens the expression and turns it inward.
editorial.retrogradeDirect: Its expression unfolds in a direct and visible way.

signPrompts.taurus: Stable, sensual presence and steady endurance.
signPrompts.virgo: Discernment, precision, and attention to detail.
signPrompts.libra: Harmony, relationship, and awareness of the other.
signPrompts.sagittarius: Search for meaning, expansion, and vision.

housePrompts.1: Here it becomes visible in identity and the way you present yourself.
housePrompts.2: Here it translates into value, resources, and security.
housePrompts.3: Here it appears in your voice, your ideas, and how you communicate.
housePrompts.4: Here it settles into roots, intimacy, and home.
housePrompts.5: Here it asks for creation, play, and the desire to express.
housePrompts.6: Here it is shaped through habits, daily work, and care.
housePrompts.7: Here it is revealed through relationship and the mirror of the other.
housePrompts.8: Here it intensifies through change and emotional depth.
housePrompts.9: Here it seeks horizon, vision, and expansion of meaning.
housePrompts.10: Here it takes public, vocational, and visible form.
housePrompts.11: Here it activates through networks, community, and future possibilities.
housePrompts.12: Here it works through the subtle, the inner, and the unconscious.

legal.cookieMessage: We use cookies to improve your experience.
legal.privacyIntro: We handle your data with care and only use what is needed to provide the service.

privacySections.title: Data we collect
privacySections.body: We may collect your name, birth date, birth city, email address and the technical data needed to create and protect your account.

privacySections.title: Why we use it
privacySections.body: We use this data to calculate your natal chart, create your account, save readings and manage billing or subscriptions when you choose a paid plan.

privacySections.title: Who we share it with
privacySections.body: We use Supabase for authentication and database storage, Stripe for payments and Anthropic for AI readings. We only share what each function needs.

privacySections.title: Your rights
privacySections.body: You can request access, deletion or portability of your data by writing to contacto@saritaastrology.com.

legal.termsIntro: These terms explain how you can use SARITA and what you can expect from the platform.

termsSections.title: Service description
termsSections.body: SARITA offers natal chart calculation, astrology readings, Moon of the Month, Astral Yoga, transits, Solar Return, synastry, astrocartography and related digital content.

termsSections.title: Subscriptions
termsSections.body: Pro and Avanzado plans are billed monthly or yearly depending on your selection. You can cancel renewal from subscription management.

termsSections.title: One-time purchases
termsSections.body: Some content, such as Intestinal Cleanse, may be purchased as one-time digital access when it is not included in your plan.

termsSections.title: Refunds
termsSections.body: Digital content is non-refundable unless required by applicable law.

termsSections.title: Acceptable use
termsSections.body: You may not use SARITA for abuse, scraping, unauthorized redistribution, reverse engineering or illegal activity.

termsSections.title: Governing law
termsSections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, from your account settings. No questions asked.

faqs.question: What happens when I cancel?
faqs.answer: You keep access until the end of your billing period.

faqs.question: Is Intestinal Cleanse included?
faqs.answer: Free with any yearly plan. Otherwise €49.99 one-time.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Pro and Avanzado?
faqs.answer: Pro gives you Moon of the Month, Astral Yoga and 5 readings per month. Avanzado adds 20 readings per month, Transits, Solar Return, Synastry and Astrocartography.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Digital content is non-refundable unless required by law.
